# Directory Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-directory
kind: Directory
spec:
    path: example
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: Directory
spec:
  path: /home/vagrant/.kube
  mode: "0755"
```
